response.justification: Bogdan brings solid full-stack engineering depth and nearly 17 years of professional experience, but falls significantly short of the Principal Engineer — Specialized Software (AI Strategy) role requirements. The position demands demonstrated AI expertise, cloud platform strategy ownership, and director-level strategic advisory experience — none of which are present in any meaningful form. His AI exposure is limited to a few months of MCP tooling work starting April 2025, he holds no advanced degree in AI or a related field, and his career arc is that of a product-focused senior/staff IC rather than a strategic technical leader advising enterprise customers.
strengths: ~17 years of professional software engineering experience across diverse product domains and tech stacks
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, showing willingness to engage with emerging AI tooling
Community presence via FOSS4G talks and workshops, indicating communication skills and technical breadth
concerns: No Master's or PhD in AI and no demonstrated research-level or production-scale AI expertise — a stated preference for the role
AI experience is extremely recent (2 months) and narrow in scope; no history of shipping AI products or defining AI strategy
No cloud platform strategy experience and no evidence of director-level or strategic customer advisory responsibilities at any point in career

key_factors.factor: AI expertise depth and tenure — role requires demonstrated, recognized AI expertise; candidate has ~2 months of peripheral AI tooling work
Strategic advisory and director-level IC experience — no evidence of advising enterprise/strategic customers or operating at director scope
Strong foundational engineering experience (~17 years) across multiple stacks and domains provides a credible base
